## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing SEO strategies, content creation, and website structure for Firework's playbooks and events pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple content strategies in progress: competitor analysis, tariff blogs, VivaTech content, and lead-generating blogs](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Debate on consolidating vs. maintaining individual landing pages for playbooks and events](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Need for clear prioritization and regular updates on Slack for better team alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Currently working on 3 content strategies for 10 articles:](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Competitor analysis (top 20 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Tariff blogs](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [VivaTech-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [New suggestion: Break down video commerce report data into smaller, industry-specific blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Action: Prateek to summarize current strategies and seek prioritization on growthx Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

### VivaTech Content Creation

  - [Challenge: Finding relevant keywords and blog topics for VivaTech](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Approach: Focus on event-specific searches (e.g., "VivaTech agenda", "companies attending VivaTech")](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Strategy: Incorporate Firework's video commerce and AI solutions within VivaTech-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Website Structure Debate: Archive vs. Individual Pages

  - [New consolidated playbooks/events archive page launched](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Abhishek's preference: Retire individual landing pages, drive traffic to archive page](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [SEO concerns:](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
      - [Potential loss of specific search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Difficulty in optimizing meta descriptions for multiple playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Prateek's recommendation: Maintain individual landing pages for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Compromise suggestion: Keep archive page, add "Read More" option linking to individual pages](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Action: Add topic to Thursday's meeting agenda for further discussion with Abhishek](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Communication and Progress Updates

  - [Request for more frequent updates on Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Share progress on article publications and other milestones regularly](https://fathom.video/share/Q_sMXtr-Kcs4gLA2DjgMDePXnLxQY9sK?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
